name: LongCat 2.0
description: LongCat 2.0 is Meituan's current LongCat generation model, replacing the earlier LongCat 2.0 Preview provider model ID for general text generation.

details.name: upstream_discovery
details.value: AI Stats provider discovery detected LongCat-2.0 added and LongCat-2.0-Preview removed on 2026-06-29.
